title: Reports+
description: An easy and flexible plugin to handle player reports!
body:
Plugin Description:
------------------
This simple yet highly flexible report management plugin makes reporting players easy and efficient. To get started, download the plugin and move it into your ./plugins folder.

Permissions:
-------------
- ReportPlus.player_report | Report players
- ReportPlus.report_alert | Get alerts when a player is reported
- ReportPlus.list_reports | List all available reports

Commands:
---------
- /report <player> | Reports a player.
- /reports | Opens up a GUI that gives a list of reports
- /reports toggle | Toggle report alerts
- /reports resolve <player> | Resolve a report using a player name
- /reports delete <player> | Delete a report using a player name

Get In Contact With Me:
---------
I'm always open to suggestions, and if you find any bugs or errors please let me know.
You can get in contact with me by joining my discord server [here](https://discord.com/invite/7d5t8C3SF6).

![Bstats Metrics](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/ReportsPlus.svg)
